tasting_rooms.name: Bodegas Muga
tasting_rooms.address: Barrio de la Estacion s/n, 26200 Haro, La Rioja, Spain
tasting_rooms.pricing: Guided winery visit with 3-wine tasting from EUR 25; introductory tasting course with 4 wines from EUR 40
tasting_rooms.description: Family bodega in Haro's Barrio de la Estacion with its own cooperage; guided tours end in a tasting of estate Riojas across the ageing rooms.

verified.address_quoted: Barrio de la Estacion, s/n, Haro, La Rioja

tasting_rooms.name: CVNE
tasting_rooms.address: Barrio de la Estacion s/n, 26200 Haro, La Rioja, Spain
tasting_rooms.pricing: Standard cellar tour with 2-wine tasting and cheese; Imperial premium tour with Gran Reserva tasting, around 2 hours
tasting_rooms.description: Founded 1879 in Haro, CVNE pours across an open-air wine bar plus guided tours of the Eiffel-designed barrel hall and the Imperial cellar.

verified.address_quoted: Barrio de la Estacion, s/n, Haro, La Rioja

tasting_rooms.name: La Rioja Alta, S.A.
tasting_rooms.address: Avenida de Vizcaya 8, 26200 Haro, La Rioja, Spain
tasting_rooms.pricing: Guided tour of the century-old winery with commented 4-wine tasting; by-the-glass wine bar at El Garaje del Club de Cosecheros
tasting_rooms.description: Historic Haro house pouring Vina Alberdi, Vina Ardanza, Vina Arana and Gran Reserva 904; tours close at a wine bar with tapas.

tasting_rooms.name: Bodegas Marques de Murrieta
tasting_rooms.address: N-232a Km 402, 26006 Logrono, La Rioja, Spain
tasting_rooms.pricing: Private tour of vineyards, Castillo de Ygay and museum with paired professional tasting; deluxe wine area pours by the glass without appointment
tasting_rooms.description: Founded 1852 around the Castillo de Ygay, Murrieta runs estate tours with a museum and a paired premium tasting of its Ygay range.

tasting_rooms.name: Vivanco Cultura de Vino
tasting_rooms.address: Carretera Nacional 232, 26330 Briones, La Rioja, Spain
tasting_rooms.pricing: Guided winery tour with tasting; combined museum plus guided wine cellar from EUR 26 booked online
tasting_rooms.description: Briones estate pairing a guided cellar tour with tastings of the family Riojas, alongside the on-site wine culture museum and Baco vine garden.

verified.address_quoted: Carretera Nacional 232, 26330. Briones - La Rioja. Spain

tasting_rooms.name: Bodegas Eguren Ugarte
tasting_rooms.pricing: Winery tour through 2 km of rock tunnels with tasting; tastings combinable with vineyard walks and harvest
tasting_rooms.description: Family bodega above 2 km of excavated cellar tunnels in Rioja Alavesa; guided visits end at a tasting room with vineyard views.

tasting_rooms.name: Bodegas Juan Carlos Sancha
tasting_rooms.address: Banos de Rio Tobia, 26320 La Rioja, Spain
tasting_rooms.neighborhood: Banos de Rio Tobia, Rioja Alta
tasting_rooms.pricing: Commented visit and tasting led by Juan Carlos Sancha, including barrel tasting of minority varieties and a centenary-vineyard 4x4 trip
tasting_rooms.description: University enology professor Juan Carlos Sancha hosts tastings of rare native Rioja grapes, with barrel samples and an old-vine vineyard outing.

tasting_rooms.name: Bohedal Bodega Boutique
tasting_rooms.address: Cuzcurrita de Rio Tiron, 26214 La Rioja, Spain
tasting_rooms.neighborhood: Cuzcurrita de Rio Tiron, Rioja Alta
tasting_rooms.pricing: Barrel tasting of Tempranillo aged in French, American and Central European oak plus a Gran Bohedal Crianza from EUR 40
tasting_rooms.description: Family wine-tourism pioneer in Cuzcurrita pouring barrel samples that contrast oak origins, ending with a blending tasting and crianza.

tasting_rooms.name: Bodegas Marques de Riscal
tasting_rooms.pricing: Winery tour with ticket reservation; the City of Wine complex pours estate and Rueda wines
tasting_rooms.description: Founded 1858 in Elciego, the Gehry-wrapped City of Wine offers guided cellar tours and tastings of Riscal's Rioja and Rueda ranges.
